tests.prompt: Run nemo-status and show me what is happening.
Use the nemo-status skill to print the dashboard.
What is running on NeMo Platform right now?
Show me the deployed agents and registered providers.
I am not sure if the agent I built earlier is still deployed and the provider is still healthy. Give me the dashboard view.
Came back to my laptop after lunch. Want a quick read on whether the platform is still up before I demo it.
Demo starts in 10 minutes. Show me platform health, agents, providers, and models in one block.
What is the status of PR #234 in the Platform repo?
Check the status of my flight to SFO tomorrow.
What is the status of the Q3 OKR review with leadership?
